summary: Tested Double-Entry Accounting (Asientos Contables) module. Backend: 17/17 tests passed for FPROV/GASTO/PAGO asiento generation, postear/anular, list/get with filters, reportes contables (mayor/balance/pnl), and periodos-contables cerrar/abrir.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend testing skipped as per request (backend only)

features_tested.asiento_fprov: PASS - POST /api/asientos/generar with origen_tipo=FPROV creates balanced entry (gasto+IGV debe, CxP haber)
features_tested.asiento_gasto: PASS - POST /api/asientos/generar with origen_tipo=GASTO creates balanced entry (gasto+IGV debe, banco/caja haber for cash paid)
features_tested.asiento_pago: PASS - POST /api/asientos/generar with origen_tipo=PAGO creates entry (CxP debe, banco haber)
features_tested.asiento_idempotent: PASS - Regenerating asiento for same document replaces borrador entry
features_tested.cannot_postear_anulado: PASS - Cannot post an already voided asiento (returns 400)
features_tested.list_asientos: PASS - GET /api/asientos returns list with total_debe, total_haber
features_tested.get_asiento_detail: PASS - GET /api/asientos/{id} returns asiento with lineas (cuenta_codigo, cuenta_nombre, tercero_nombre)
features_tested.reporte_mayor: PASS - GET /api/reportes/mayor returns ledger with posted entries
features_tested.reporte_balance: PASS - GET /api/reportes/balance returns balance sheet grouped by ACTIVO/PASIVO/PATRIMONIO
features_tested.reporte_pnl: PASS - GET /api/reportes/pnl returns P&L with INGRESO/GASTO/COSTO and utilidad_neta
features_tested.cerrar_periodo: PASS - POST /api/periodos-contables/cerrar blocks posting when borrador asientos exist
features_tested.abrir_periodo: PASS - POST /api/periodos-contables/abrir opens a closed period
features_tested.list_periodos: PASS - GET /api/periodos-contables returns list of period records

accounting_logic_verified.FPROV: Debe: base_gravada (6399) + IGV (4012), Haber: total CxP (4212)
accounting_logic_verified.GASTO: Debe: gasto (6399) + IGV (4012), Haber: banco/caja (101) if paid, CxP if not
accounting_logic_verified.PAGO: Debe: CxP (4212), Haber: banco (cuenta financiera cuenta_contable_id or 101)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Double-entry accounting module fully tested. Tables: cont_asiento (journal entries), cont_asiento_linea (entry lines), cont_periodo_cerrado (closed periods). All asiento generation endpoints work correctly for FPROV/GASTO/PAGO. Reports (mayor/balance/pnl) return proper data from posted entries only. Periodo cerrar validates borrador asientos exist. Use empresa_id=6 for testing.
